scenario.title: Penguin Species Research Report and Presentation
scenario.query: Analyze penguin morphology data, generate publication-quality figures, write a specialist report, and create conference slides.
scenario.description: A curated SkillFabric demo based on the official AgentSkillOS data_computation_task1 benchmark. The task requires statistical analysis, visualization, DOCX report generation, and PPTX slide composition.

task_requirements.title: Analyze morphology data
task_requirements.detail: Compute descriptive statistics, species comparison tests, and sex-based morphology comparisons.

task_requirements.title: Generate research figures
task_requirements.detail: Create at least four publication-quality PNG charts for species comparisons, correlations, and distributions.

task_requirements.title: Produce research deliverables
task_requirements.detail: Assemble report.docx and presentation.pptx with coherent scientific interpretation.

communities.name: Data Analysis and Visualization
communities.summary: Skills for loading tabular data, computing statistics, and rendering charts.

communities.name: Document and Presentation Production
communities.summary: Skills for creating polished DOCX reports, PPTX slides, and narrative deliverables.

communities.name: Data Storytelling
communities.summary: Skills that turn analysis outputs into a coherent research argument.

candidates.reason: Directly supports publication-quality plots, correlation charts, distribution views, and figure-ready visual storytelling.
Handles tabular data loading and pandas-style analysis over CSV/XLSX-like datasets.
Matches the requirement for descriptive statistics, comparison tests, and group-wise analysis.
Supports writing a specialist-facing report with interpretation, tables, and embedded figures.
Covers PowerPoint generation and layout validation for conference-style slides.
Helps convert statistical findings into a coherent research narrative for report and slides.
A specialized document-format skill useful when final DOCX layout needs direct handling.
Potentially useful for illustrative diagrams, but less central than statistical charts.

selected_skills.reason: Reads the penguins dataset and prepares clean grouped tables for downstream analysis.
Provides the explicit statistical reasoning required by the benchmark task.
Generates the required PNG figures used by both report and slides.
Turns tables and figures into a specialist-facing DOCX report with interpretation.
Handles the presentation.pptx deliverable and slide layout requirements.

rerank_summary: The query-local wiki narrows the task to five complementary skills: tabular data preparation, statistical comparison, scientific visualization, report writing, and PPTX slide generation. The curated package keeps presentation-specific capability separate from general document coauthoring so both official deliverables are covered.

workflow.purpose: Load artifacts/penguins.csv and prepare clean analysis tables.
Compute species-level descriptive statistics and comparison tests.
Generate at least four publication-quality PNG figures.
Assemble report.docx with tables, figures, and written interpretation.
Create presentation.pptx with at least 10 academic-style slides.
Collect report.docx, presentation.pptx, PNG figures, and validation trace.
